disclaimerPage.title: Legal Disclaimers
disclaimerPage.subtitle: Please read these disclaimers carefully regarding the use of IKIKE.
disclaimerPage.globalDesc: IKIKE provides health information for educational purposes only. It does not replace professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified doctor.
disclaimerPage.searchDesc: Content shown is educational. IKIKE does not provide medical or herbal treatment advice.
disclaimerPage.traditionalDesc: Wellness information is for educational purposes only. IKIKE does not recommend herbs as treatments or provide dosages.
disclaimerPage.emergencyDesc: Seek immediate care for urgent medical issues. Contact emergency services if needed.
disclaimerPage.directoryDesc: Listings are for informational purposes. IKIKE does not guarantee the quality of third-party services.

aboutPage.subtitle: Ikiké Health AI is a platform bridging the gap between medical science and traditional wellness wisdom.
aboutPage.visionText: We envision a world where everyone has access to reliable, evidence-based health information that respects both science and tradition.
aboutPage.value1Text: Information comes from peer-reviewed medical journals.
aboutPage.value2Text: Health insights tailored for a global audience.
aboutPage.value3Text: A verified directory of medical professionals.
aboutPage.integritySubtitle: Built on strict safety and privacy standards.
aboutPage.security2Text: Experts ensuring documentation meets health standards.
aboutPage.security3Text: Full data ownership with medical-grade encryption.

developersPage.subtitle: Integrate verified health information into your own apps with our robust API.
developersPage.feature1Desc: Access medical journals and wellness knowledge via our API.
developersPage.feature2Desc: Built with HIPAA and GDPR standards in mind.
developersPage.feature3Desc: Search in English, Spanish, and French.
developersPage.requestFormSubtitle: Tell us about your project to get access.
developersPage.placeholderUseCase: How will you use the API?...
developersPage.successMsg: We'll review your application and contact you soon.

restricted.title: Intelligence Registry Restricted
restricted.description: The verified expert directory and clinical specialist registry are exclusive to authenticated members. Sign in or initialize your node to access the network.
